title: pairs-scanner output
description: Canonical structured output for the pairs-scanner skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered table) is described in references/rendering.md.

basket.description: Tickers the caller passed via --basket (uppercased, dedup'd).

lookback_days.description: Trading-day window for the cointegration fit.

n_aligned_bars.description: Number of dates on which every basket ticker had a close.

parameters.description: Every filter / threshold used for this run so the payload is self-contained.

tradeable.description: Pairs that passed every filter. Sorted by |z_current| descending.

considered_but_rejected.description: Pairs that passed the correlation prefilter and had full diagnostics computed but failed one or more tradeable filters. Sorted by ADF t-stat (most stationary first).

skipped_correlation.description: Pairs skipped before the cointegration test (correlation prefilter or insufficient history).

tier_caveats.description: Human-readable caveats: methodology limits, regime-shift warnings, missing data.

pair.description: '{dependent}-{independent}'. Dependent is the ticker on the left of log(y) = alpha + beta*log(x).

n_observations.description: Aligned trading-day observations used to fit the pair.

correlation_log_returns.description: Pearson rho of the two tickers' daily log returns.

hedge_ratio_beta.description: Slope from OLS log(dependent) = alpha + beta * log(independent).

adf_tstat.description: Dickey-Fuller t-statistic on the residual, no constant, lag=1. More negative means more stationary.

cointegration_bucket.description: MacKinnon 2010 critical value bucket for N=2 cointegration with constant.

pvalue_upper_bound.description: Approximate upper bound on the EG p-value implied by the bucket (0.01, 0.05, 0.10, or 0.50).

half_life_days.description: Ornstein-Uhlenbeck half-life in trading days from OLS of Δresidual on lagged residual. Null when the residual is not mean-reverting (slope >= 0) or the estimate falls outside [0.5, 365].

os_std_ratio.description: Ratio of out-of-sample residual std to in-sample residual std under a 70/30 split with the IS hedge ratio applied to the OS chunk. Null when the OS chunk is too small.

stability_label.description: 'stable' when os_std_ratio < 1.5, 'regime_shift' when >= 1.5, 'insufficient_os_sample' when the OS chunk was too small to compute.

tradeable.description: True when every filter passed. False when one or more filters rejected the pair; see tradeable_rejections[].

tradeable_rejections.description: Human-readable reasons the tradeable flag is False (empty when tradeable is True).
